titleStmt.title: SII 9.294: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 294. (A.R. No. 504 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE KALKANTHARAYA TEMPLE AT KARAKANTHAPURAM, NEAR PEDDATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Tāraṇa, Jyēshṭha, puṇṇame, Vaḍḍavāra, Sōmagrahaṇa = A.D. 1164 June 6, Saturday, when there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Kalachurya-Chakravarti, Bhujabalamalladēva (i.e., Bijjala). Barmarasa, Śrīdhara-Nāyaka, Rudramayya-Nāyaka, Kahnēśvara-Nāyaka and Peggaḍe Nāmarasa ruling over Sindavāḍi from Kīrttinārāyaṇanagarī. Eṟeyamaseṭṭi, son of Bammiseṭṭi, set up the image of Brahmēśvaradēva. The Mahāprachaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka Bammidēvarasa is stated to have granted the village Kōsa-geyahāḻu situated in Kandukūru twenty-four for the service of the god Brahmēśvara, in addition to some land and an oil-mill. The Nakaras are stated to have granted a portion of the toll-revenue.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷa
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka kāḷāṁjanapuravarādhī
śvara suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvaja ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇa kadanapracaṁ
ḍa subhaṭarāditya kaligaḷaṁkuśa caladaṁkarāma śrīmatkaḷacu
ryyacakravartti bhujabaḷamalladēvar nijavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamiral kalyāṇada nelavīḍi
noḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . ka © tatpādapadma
madhukaranutpāṭitavairivṛkṣamūḷaṁ dharaṇībhṛtputrīpatibhaktaṁ
satpuruṣaṁ kāḷidāsadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . Ātana kumāranupamātītaguṇā
dāranabhavapadanakharukca(ṁ)ndrātapacakōranahitakujātōgrakuṭhāranenipa bamma
camūpaṁ . karaṇādhikārigaḷ śrīdharanāyaka rudramayyanāyaka
kahnēśvaranāyaka peggaḍe nāmarasarivarvverasu cakravarttiya besadiṁ . praṇutata
ra kīrttinārāyaṇanagariyoḷirddu siṁdavāḍiyanāḷutteṇeyārttana
gene kali bammaṇadaṁḍādhīśanarasugeyyuttirddaṁ . va . tatpādapadmāśrayanuṁ
kubēravaṁśānvayanuvadhikabhāgyōdayanuvabhavapadadhyānahṛdaya
numappa mahāpaḍḍavyavahāri . ka . Akaḷaṁkacaritanāśritanikāya
pōṣakananēkanītiyutaṁ vaiśyakulapradhānanamaḷaprakaṭayaśaṁ ba
mmiseṭṭi nūtnakubēraṁ . Ene negaḷda bammiseṭṭigavanūnabhāgyavati kētikabbegamā
daṁ tanayaṁ śrōtriyakuḷamaṇḍananeṟeyamaseṭṭi śivapadābjabhra
maraṁ . śrōtriyaneṟeyamanamaḷacaritraṁ pratipakṣajaitranavyava
dhūṭīputraṁ viśiṣṭabudhajanamitraṁ nirmmaḷina vaiśyagōtrapavitraṁ . va . Anteni
si negaḷteyaṁ paḍeda mahāvaḍḍavyavahāri śrōtriyaṟeyamaseṭṭi pra
tiṣThe māḍida śrībrahmēśvaradēvara mahāṁgabōgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dīpadhūpa
nivēdyakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnasudhālēpyādi navakarmmanirmmāṇakkavendu
śrīmanmahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ bammidēvarasar samastakaraṇā
gaḷ pramukhavāgi śrīmatkaḷacuryyacakravartti bhujabaḷamallidēvava
ya tāraṇasaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha śuddha pu(ṁ)ṇnami vaḍḍavāradaṁdu sōmagrahaṇa
kaṁdukūrirppattanālkaṟoḷagaṇa kōsageyahāḷaṁ dhārāpū
va koṭṭar mattaṁ sthaḷavṛttiyāgi keṟekaṇṭhadēvara kēriyiṁ teṁkalmūṟu
manondugāṇamumanondu tōṭamumaṁ koṭṭar . nakaraṁga
kkeraḍu vīsamumanaṁgaḍiyaloṁdu saṭṭuga bhattamumaṁ kūṭṭa
ṇigaru hēṟiṁge nūṟeleyaṁ koṭṭar . v® . Idanāvaṁ kāvanā
kaviḷānīkamaṁ vāraṇāsinadiyoḷsabrāhmaṇarggittanupamaphalasaṁ
nyāyadiniṁtī dharmmamaṁ saṁharipananitu gōbrātaviprau
nantā tīrtthatīrāgradoḷaḷida mahāpātakaṁ tānenippaṁ . ka . Arasara
karaṇaṁgaḷa kāṇkeyeṁdu manneyadeṟeyaṁdaruvaṇavendu dāva
nakke koṇḍavarccaṇḍāḷar . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rāja
yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 9.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
